fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique name (code) of the financial report.

fields.name: Excel Template Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Excel Layout that will be used when exporting to Excel.

fields.name: PeriodTypeDefault
fields.tooltip: Specifies by which period amounts are displayed.

fields.name: NegativeAmountFormatDefault
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default negative amount format for this financial report.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a title of the financial report. The text is shown as a title on the final report when you run it to get a PDF or to print it.

fields.name: Financial Report Row Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the row definition (code) to be used for this financial report.

fields.name: Financial Report Column Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the column definition (code) to be used for this financial report.

fields.name: Internal Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the internal description of this financial report.

fields.name: LogoPositionDefault
fields.tooltip: Specifies how your company logo is displayed on the financial report.

fields.name: DimPerspective
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension perspective to be used for the financial report.

fields.name: Last Run by User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date-time this report was run by you.

fields.name: CategoryCode
fields.tooltip: Specifies the category code for the financial report.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status code for the financial report. The status code helps you organize the lifecycle of your financial reports.

fields.name: Status Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status code is a blocked status.
